productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Cat Logo Navy Blue Cap
description: Created using 100% cotton, this cap from puma is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Wear it in summers or winters and keep yourself safe from the sun. Crown made of cotton fabric with eyelets to offer breathable comfort Curved visor with contrast colour on the periphery Adjustable strap at the back for a customised Fit Embroidered puma cat logo on the front of the crown for style Cap care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not wring, bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean Stretch to original shape while damp
